description: Relay polish of an existing artifact: pass it down a line of improvers, consolidating each round.

Supply the idea, code, or text to improve via the prompt/context — this preset improves what exists, it does not create from scratch. Staff `improver` with 2 or more models; each takes the current draft and makes it better. A `polisher` consolidates at the end of every round, so each round builds on the last polished version. Use rounds >= 2 to keep iterating.

roles.description: Take the current draft and make it materially better. Fix flaws, tighten, and raise quality — do not rewrite from scratch or change the intent.
Merge this round's improvements into one clean, coherent version of the artifact. Resolve conflicts and keep the best of each.
